questionHtml:
What is the value of the temperature change?

Initial temperature: 2.0 ± 0.1 °C

Final temperature: 15.0 ± 1.0 °C

A. 13.0 ± 0.1 °C

B. 13.0 ± 0.9 °C

C. 13.0 ± 1.0 °C

D. 13.0 ± 1.1 °C
